name: Irish Potato Cakes
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups potatoes, mashed, fresh, with milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butter into the flour until it forms large granules.
2. Add the salt and baking powder, mix well.
3. Mix in the potatoes.
4. Knead for a few minutes.
5. Roll out onto a lightly floured board using a floured rolling pin.
6. Cut into 2 rounds.
7. Cook on a dry griddle or skillet until brown on both sides.
